title: Continue an offline session-index storage decision

events.text: Design a local session index that works offline on Windows, macOS, and Linux with no native dependency.
SQLite gives good queries, but the chosen driver requires native binaries on Windows.
The clean Windows install fails while compiling the SQLite binding.
Use append-only JSONL plus an in-memory index until measured startup exceeds two seconds at 10,000 sessions.
Append and startup loading are implemented in src/index/jsonl-store.ts; 10,000 synthetic sessions load in 640 ms.
Update churn grows the file indefinitely; compaction and crash-safe replacement are not implemented.

criticalConstraints.text: The index must work fully offline.
Do not require native dependencies on supported platforms.

objectiveAndState.text: Provide a portable local session index; JSONL meets startup goals, compaction is missing.

decisionsAndFailedAttempts.text: The SQLite driver was rejected after a clean Windows native build failure.
Use append-only JSONL until 10,000-session startup exceeds two seconds.

completedAndPending.text: Append and startup loading meet the measured threshold; crash-safe compaction remains pending.

workspaceEvidence.text: jsonl-store.ts and its startup test are new; compact.ts is absent.

nextAction.text: Design a crash-safe compaction test before implementing atomic JSONL replacement.
